case_title: AWAD MOHAMED ET AL VS. HECTOR ROSALES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $00.0 SERVED SEP-09-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, HECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY MOHAMED, AWAD MCKEON, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, HECTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF AWAD MOHAMED AND NICK MCKEON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HECTOR ROSALES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED PARTIES ORALLY STIPULATED TO A PRO TEM JUDGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHAMED, AWAD MCKEON, NICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES, HECTOR $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,150.00, ($4600.00-$1500.00 ALREADY PAID = $3100.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
